matchers: has been compiled by a more recent version
reasons: The incorrect version of Java is being used
fixes: Report this issue to Nitrolaunch developers

matchers: Could not create the Java Virtual Machine
reasons: Invalid JVM arguments
Not enough memory allocated
fixes: Verify custom JVM arguments are correct
Allocate more RAM for the game
Report this issue to Nitrolaunch developers

reasons: Not enough RAM was allocated
fixes: Increase the min and max RAM allocations
Remove the set RAM allocations, and use the default ones instead
Use the `modded` preset from the Octane plugin

matchers: libflite.so: cannot open shared object file
reasons: The flite library is not installed on your system
fixes: Install libflite using your system package manager

reasons: Display Adapter or Remote Desktop error
fixes: Install or update graphics drivers for your GPU

reasons: AMD OpenGL driver crash
fixes: Update or reinstall AMD graphics drivers

reasons: Nvidia OpenGL driver crash
fixes: Update or reinstall Nvidia graphics drivers

reasons: WSL emulation
fixes: Don't use WSL

reasons: Network connection is unstable or incorrect
fixes: Ensure you are connected to the internet
Make sure the server address is correct
Make sure the server is running
Check your firewall or router

matchers: java.io.IOException: An existing connection was forcibly closed
reasons: Connection blocked by firewall
fixes: Ensure your firewall allows connections from Minecraft, including on port 25565

reasons: Another server is already running on the same port
fixes: Stop or kill other Minecraft servers on your computer or network
If using a proxy, ensure that each server is using a different port, and not the same port as the proxy

reasons: Incompatible mods are installed
Incompatible mod versions are installed
You are using the wrong version of the Fabric or Quilt loader
fixes: Check documentation for the mods you are using
Update your loader
Update your mods
Send your log to the Nitrolaunch Discord to help us give a more specific fix in the future

reasons: Mod is installed for the wrong Minecraft version
fixes: Update Minecraft to a later version
Downgrade the version of the mod

reasons: The same mod is installed twice
fixes: Remove the extra mod from the mods folder
Remove the mod package from your config and update
If the mod is in a dependency and bundled somewhere else, try using a suppress override to remove it, then update

reasons: Fabric Loader is too old for one of your mods
fixes: Update the instance
Switch to a later version of Fabric Loader

reasons: One of your datapacks is broken and preventing the world from loading
fixes: Remove the datapack
Report the issue to the datapack developer

reasons: Installed mods are adding too much data to the network for it to handle
fixes: Install a mod that increases packet size
Remove any large mods with a lot of content

matchers: Mod resolution failed because the environment is disabled: CLIENT
reasons: A mod is installed that only works on clients
fixes: Remove the mod

reasons: Mods do not match between client and server
fixes: Check that mods and versions are all the same

reasons: owo-lib on alpha version
fixes: Downgrade owo-lib to version 0.12.15.4

reasons: Conflict between Farmer's Delight Refabricated 3.3.2 - 1.21.1 and Nature's Delight 1.12-1.21.1
fixes: Downgrade Farmer's Delight to version 3.2.0
